# MementoDB Framework - Complete API Reference

> For quick overview, see `llms.txt`. This file contains the full API for all 12 core modules.

## Module: MementoConfig (v8.0.0)

Central configuration - single source of truth for all field names, library names, constants.
Dependencies: None (foundation module).
File: `core/MementoConfig.js` (2,081 lines)

### Public API

```
getConfig() -> Object                              Full CONFIG object
get(path, defaultValue) -> Any                     Nested path accessor (e.g., "fields.attendance.date")
getField(category, field) -> String                Field name by category (e.g., getField("attendance", "date"))
getCommonField(field) -> String                    Common field (debugLog, errorLog, info)
getLibrary(name) -> String                         Library name by key
getLibraryId(name) -> String                       Memento API library ID
getConstant(category, key) -> Any                  Business constant value
getIcon(name) -> String                            Emoji icon by key
getAttribute(category, attr) -> Any                LinkToEntry attribute
getGlobalSetting(key) -> Any                       Locale/global setting
getAttendanceField(field) -> String                Shortcut for attendance fields
getWorkRecordField(field) -> String                Shortcut for work record fields
getEmployeeAttribute(attr) -> Any                  Shortcut for employee attributes
getSection(sectionName) -> Object                  Full config section
getAllLibraries() -> Array<String>                  List all library keys
getAllFields(category) -> Array<String>             List all field keys in category
hasLibrary(name) -> Boolean                        Check if library exists
hasField(category, field) -> Boolean               Check if field exists
getReportConfig(reportType) -> Object              Report type configuration
getAllReportTypes() -> Array<String>                List report type keys
hasReportConfig(reportType) -> Boolean             Check if report type exists
getLibraryModule(moduleName) -> Object             Library module metadata
getModuleFields(moduleName) -> Object              Module field mappings
```

### Configuration Sections

```
config.global          - { timezone, dateFormat, timeFormat, currency, currencySymbol, language }
config.libraries       - { attendance, workRecords, rideLog, cashBook, employee, orders, quotes, ... }
config.libraryIds      - { dailyReport: "Tt4pxN4xQ", quotes: "90RmdjWuk", ... }
config.fields          - { attendance: { date, arrival, departure, employee, ... }, employee: { name, hourlyRate, ... }, ... }
config.fields.common   - { debugLog: "Debug_Log", errorLog: "Error_Log", info: "info" }
config.constants       - { status, attendanceTypes, obligationStates, vatRates, workSchedule, ... }
config.icons           - { success: "✅", error: "❌", warning: "⚠️", ... } (100+ icons)
config.attributes      - { employees: { wage, position, ... }, ... }
config.recipientMapping - Telegram recipient type configurations
config.libraryMapping  - Library-specific Telegram field mappings
config.reportConfigs   - Report type configurations (work, ride, machines, materials)
config.libraryModules  - Metadata for reusable modules (Dochadzka, Pokladna, etc.)
```

---

## Module: MementoCore (v8.0.0)

Foundation utilities: logging, safe field access, validation, formatting.
Dependencies: MementoConfig.
File: `core/MementoCore.js` (1,864 lines)

### Logging

```
addDebug(entry, message, section) -> void           Write to Debug_Log field with timestamp
addError(entry, message, section, error) -> void    Write to Error_Log field with error details
addInfo(entry, message, data, metadata) -> void     Write to info field (user-visible results)
clearLogs(entry) -> void                            Clear Debug_Log, Error_Log, info fields
```

### Safe Field Access

```
safeGet(entry, fieldName, defaultValue) -> Any      Read field safely (returns default if null/undefined)
safeSet(entry, fieldName, value) -> Boolean          Write field safely (returns false on error)
safeGetAttribute(entry, attrName) -> Any             Read LinkToEntry attribute safely
safeSetAttribute(entry, attrName, value) -> Boolean  Write LinkToEntry attribute safely
```

### Validation

```
validateInputData(entry, requiredFields, options) -> Object {valid, errors}
    - Section-based: validateInputData(entry, "attendance", options)
    - Array-based: validateInputData(entry, ["Date", "Arrival"], options)
validateRequiredFields(entry, fields) -> Boolean     Quick check if all fields have values
```

### Formatting & Dates

```
formatDate(date, format) -> String                  Format date using moment.js
formatTime(time, format) -> String                  Format time
formatMoney(amount, currency) -> String             Format as currency
isWeekend(date) -> Boolean                          Check if Saturday/Sunday
isHoliday(date) -> Boolean                          Check against holiday calendar
getDayNameSK(date) -> String                        Day name in Slovak
setDayOfWeekField(entry, dateField, dayField) -> void  Auto-set day name from date
```

### UI & Records

```
getIcon(name) -> String                             Get emoji icon from config
setColor(entry, colorName) -> void                  Set record color
removeColor(entry) -> void                          Remove record color
getColor(entry) -> String                           Get current record color
setColorByCondition(entry, condition, colorName) -> void  Conditional coloring
convertToHex(colorName) -> String                   Color name to hex
addRecordIcon(entry, iconName) -> void              Set record icon
removeRecordIcon(entry) -> void                     Remove record icon
```

### Utilities

```
findEntryById(libraryName, id) -> Entry             Find record by ID in another library
getCurrentUser() -> String                          Get current user name
findRecordIndex(entries, id) -> Number              Find record position in array
selectOsobaForm(count) -> String                    Slovak person noun form (1/2-4/5+)
getPersonCountForm(count) -> String                 Slovak person count form
renumberLibraryRecords(libraryName, startNumber) -> void  Renumber all records
showErrorDialog(title, message) -> void             Show error dialog
showSuccessDialog(title, message) -> void            Show success dialog
showInfoDialog(title, message) -> void               Show info dialog
createScriptConfig(scriptName, version) -> Object    Create script configuration object
```

---

## Module: MementoUtils (v8.1.0)

Lazy-loading aggregator - single import point for all modules.
Dependencies: MementoCore, MementoConfig (required); all others optional.
File: `core/MementoUtils.js` (883 lines)

### Public API

```
checkAllDependencies(silent) -> Object {success, missing, outdated, available}
```

### Lazy-Loaded Module Properties

```
.config         -> MementoConfig (Level 0)
.core           -> MementoCore (Level 1)
.time           -> MementoTime (Level 2)
.date           -> MementoDate (Level 2)
.validation     -> MementoValidation (Level 2)
.formatting     -> MementoFormatting (Level 2)
.calculations   -> MementoCalculations (Level 2)
.business       -> MementoBusiness (Level 3)
.ai             -> MementoAI (Specialized)
.gps            -> MementoGPS (Specialized)
.recordTracking -> MementoRecordTracking (Specialized)
.idConflictResolver -> MementoIDConflictResolver (Specialized)
```

### Proxied Functions (backward compatibility from MementoCore)

All MementoCore functions are also accessible directly on utils:
```
utils.addDebug(...)     // Same as utils.core.addDebug(...)
utils.safeGet(...)      // Same as utils.core.safeGet(...)
utils.formatMoney(...)  // Same as utils.core.formatMoney(...)
// etc.
```

---

## Module: MementoBusiness (v8.4.1)

High-level business workflows. Orchestrates Level 2 utility modules.
Dependencies: MementoCore, MementoConfig, MementoTime, MementoDate, MementoValidation, MementoFormatting, MementoCalculations.
File: `core/MementoBusiness.js` (1,883 lines)

### Employee Operations

```
getEmployeeDetails(employeeEntry) -> Object         Extract employee data (name, rate, position, etc.)
findEmployeeByNick(nickName) -> Entry               Find employee by nickname
getActiveEmployees() -> Array<Entry>                 Get all active employees
getEmployeeWageForDate(employee, date) -> Number    Get wage valid for specific date
findValidSalary(employee, date) -> Object           Find salary record valid for date
findValidHourlyRate(employee, date) -> Number       Get hourly rate for date
processEmployee(employee) -> Object {success, data, error}  Process single employee
processEmployees(employees) -> Array                 Batch process employees
showProcessingSummary(results) -> void               Show dialog with processing results
```

### Price Lookups

```
findValidPrice(category, date) -> Number            Find price valid for date
findValidItemPrice(item, date) -> Number             Item price for date
findValidMachinePrice(machine, date) -> Number       Machine price for date
findValidWorkPrice(workType, date) -> Number          Work type price for date
```

### Work Time

```
calculateWorkTime(entry, startField, endField) -> Object {hours, minutes}
```

### Obligations & Reports

```
createObligation(data) -> Object {success, obligationId}      Create financial obligation
updateObligation(obligationId, updates) -> Object {success}    Update obligation
findExistingObligations(criteria) -> Array<Entry>               Search obligations
createOrUpdateReport(reportData) -> Object {success, reportId} Create/update report
createOrUpdateDailyReport(date, data) -> Object {success}      Daily report upsert
findExistingReport(criteria) -> Entry                           Search for existing report
```

### Auto-Numbering

```
generateNextNumber(libraryName, prefix) -> String    Generate next sequential number (e.g., "INV-0042")
```

---

## Module: MementoTime (v1.1.0)

Time operations. No dependencies (standalone).
File: `core/MementoTime.js` (369 lines)

### Public API

```
roundToQuarterHour(time) -> Time                     Round to nearest 15 minutes
calculateHoursDifference(startTime, endTime) -> Object {hours, minutes, totalMinutes, crossesMidnight}
calculateBreakTime(startTime, endTime, breakMinutes) -> Object {workHours, breakTime}
crossesMidnight(startTime, endTime) -> Boolean       Check if time span crosses midnight
minutesToDecimalHours(minutes) -> Number              Convert minutes to decimal hours (90 -> 1.5)
decimalHoursToMinutes(hours) -> Number                Convert decimal hours to minutes (1.5 -> 90)
formatHoursAsTime(decimalHours) -> String             Format as "H:mm" (8.75 -> "8:45")
formatHoursDisplay(decimalHours, decimals) -> String  Format as "Xh" (6.75 -> "6.75h")
isValidTime(time) -> Boolean                          Check if valid time value
```

### Constants
```
CONSTANTS.MINUTES_PER_HOUR = 60
CONSTANTS.HOURS_PER_DAY = 24
CONSTANTS.QUARTER_HOUR = 15
```

---

## Module: MementoDate (v1.0.0)

Calendar utilities with holiday support.
Dependencies: None (optional: MementoConfig for holiday overrides).
File: `core/MementoDate.js` (527 lines)

### Public API

```
isHoliday(date) -> Boolean                           Check against holiday calendar
isWeekend(date) -> Boolean                           Check if Saturday/Sunday
isWorkday(date) -> Boolean                           Not weekend and not holiday
getWeekNumber(date) -> Number                        ISO week number
getWorkdaysInMonth(year, month) -> Number            Count workdays in month
formatDate(date, format) -> String                   Format date
parseDate(dateString) -> Date                         Parse date string
getDateRange(startDate, endDate) -> Object            Date range info
getHolidaysInYear(year) -> Array<Object>              List holidays for year
```

### Constants
```
SLOVAK_FIXED_HOLIDAYS   - Fixed-date holidays (Jan 1, May 1, etc.)
EASTER_DATES            - Easter date lookup table
```

Note: Currently hardcoded with Slovak holidays. See PRODUCTIZATION-ROADMAP.md for localization plan.

---

## Module: MementoValidation (v1.0.0)

Input validation patterns.
Dependencies: MementoCore (optional).
File: `core/MementoValidation.js` (571 lines)

### Public API

```
validateTime(time) -> Object {valid, error}           Validate time value
validateDate(date) -> Object {valid, error}           Validate date value
validateNumber(number) -> Object {valid, error}       Validate numeric value
validateRequired(value) -> Object {valid, error}      Check not null/undefined/empty
validateRange(value, min, max) -> Object {valid, error}  Check numeric range
validateEmail(email) -> Object {valid, error}          Validate email format
validatePhone(phone) -> Object {valid, error}          Validate phone format
validateEmployee(employee) -> Object {valid, error}    Validate employee entry
validateWorkHours(hours, options) -> Object {valid, error}  Validate work hours (0-24 range, etc.)
```

---

## Module: MementoFormatting (v1.1.4)

Display formatters for money, time, text.
Dependencies: None (optional: MementoCore).
File: `core/MementoFormatting.js` (618 lines)

### Public API

```
formatMoney(amount, currency) -> String               Format as currency (1250 -> "1 250,00 €")
formatNumber(number, decimals) -> String              Format number with decimals
formatDuration(minutes) -> String                     Format as "Xh Ym" (90 -> "1h 30m")
formatMinutes(minutes) -> String                      Short minute format
formatPercent(value, decimals) -> String               Format as percentage
formatEmployeeName(entry) -> String                    Format employee display name
formatPhoneNumber(phone) -> String                     Format phone with country code
formatMarkdown(text) -> String                         Apply Telegram-compatible markdown
formatList(items, options) -> String                    Format array as bulleted/numbered list
```

---

## Module: MementoCalculations (v1.0.0)

Business math: wages, overtime, VAT, profitability.
Dependencies: MementoTime, MementoDate (optional: MementoConfig).
File: `core/MementoCalculations.js` (639 lines)

### Public API

```
calculateWorkHours(startTime, endTime) -> Object {hours, minutes, totalMinutes}
calculateDailyWage(hours, hourlyRate) -> Number        hours * rate
calculateMonthlyStats(entries) -> Object {totalHours, totalWage, stats}
calculateBreak(startTime, endTime, breakMinutes) -> Object {workHours, breakTime}
calculateOvertime(hours, standardHours) -> Number      hours - standard (if positive)
calculateProfitability(revenue, costs) -> Object {profit, margin, percentage}
calculateVAT(amount, vatRate) -> Number                amount * rate
removeVAT(totalAmount, vatRate) -> Object {withoutVAT, vat}   Reverse VAT calculation
calculateProration(amount, days, totalDays) -> Object {proratedAmount, percentage}
```

### Constants (configurable via MementoConfig)
```
STANDARD_WORK_DAY_HOURS = 8       (from config.constants.workSchedule.standardHours)
OVERTIME_MULTIPLIER = 1.25        (from config.constants)
STANDARD_VAT_RATE = 0.20          (from config.constants.vatRates.standard)
```

---

## Module: MementoTelegram (v8.2.0)

Telegram Bot API integration. NOT aggregated in MementoUtils (circular dependency).
Dependencies: MementoCore, MementoConfig.
File: `core/MementoTelegram.js` (1,556 lines)

### IMPORTANT: Import directly, NOT via utils
```javascript
var telegram = typeof MementoTelegram !== 'undefined' ? MementoTelegram : null;
```

### Message Management

```
createTelegramMessage(content, options) -> Object     Build message object
editTelegramMessage(chatId, messageId, newContent) -> Boolean
deleteTelegramMessage(chatId, messageId) -> Boolean
getBotToken() -> String                                Get bot token from config
```

### Sending

```
sendTelegramMessage(chatId, message, options) -> Object {success, messageId}
sendToTelegram(recipient, message) -> Object {success, messageId}
sendNotificationEntry(notificationEntry) -> Boolean    Send from notification record
```

### Recipient Resolution

```
getTelegramGroup(groupName) -> Object                  Get group chat config
getTelegramID(individual) -> String                    Get individual's Telegram ID
getTelegramFromIndividual(individual) -> String         Resolve from individual entry
getTelegramFromGroup(group) -> String                   Resolve from group entry
getTelegramFromOrder(order) -> Object                   Resolve from order entry
```

### Notification Management

```
createNotification(data) -> Entry                      Create notification record
createNotificationEntry(data) -> Entry                 Create and link notification
linkNotification(source, notification) -> Boolean      Link notification to source
linkNotificationToSource(notification, source) -> Boolean
cleanupOldNotifications(days) -> Number                Delete old notifications
getLinkedNotifications(source) -> Array<Entry>          Get notifications for source
deleteNotificationAndTelegram(notificationEntry) -> Boolean  Delete notification + Telegram message
```

### Helpers

```
isNewRecord(entry) -> Boolean                          Check if unsaved record
checkPermissions(user) -> Boolean                      Check user permissions
updateStatus(entry, status) -> Boolean                 Update notification status
detectFormatting(text) -> Object                        Detect markdown formatting
escapeMarkdown(text) -> String                          Escape special chars
createInlineKeyboard(buttons) -> Object                 Create inline keyboard markup
updateSourceEntryInfo(sourceEntry, data) -> void        Update source after send
updateAfterSuccess(entry, messageId, status) -> void    Update entry after successful send
```

---

## Module: MementoAI (v8.0.0)

AI service integration (OpenAI GPT-4, Anthropic Claude).
Dependencies: MementoUtils.
File: `core/MementoAI.js` (454 lines)

### Public API

```
httpRequest(method, url, body, headers, options) -> Object {code, body, headers}
getApiKey(provider) -> String                          Get API key ("openai" or "claude")
callAI(provider, prompt, model, options) -> Object {success, response, error}
analyzeImage(imageUrl, prompt, provider) -> Object {success, analysis, error}
preparePromptWithContext(prompt, context) -> String    Build contextual prompt
parseAIJson(content) -> Object|null                     Parse JSON from AI response
```

### Constants
```
AI_PROVIDERS = { openai: { baseUrl, defaultModel }, claude: { baseUrl, defaultModel } }
```

---

## Module: MementoGPS (v1.1.0)

GPS utilities and OSRM routing.
Dependencies: MementoUtils.
File: `core/MementoGPS.js` (346 lines)

### Public API

```
calculateOSRMRoute(points, profile) -> Object {distance, duration, success}
calculateSegment(point1, point2) -> Object {distance, direction}
calculateAirDistance(point1, point2) -> Number          Haversine distance in km
extractGPSFromPlace(place) -> Object {lat, lon}        Extract coordinates from place entry
toRadians(degrees) -> Number                            Degrees to radians
callOSRMRoute(coordinates) -> Object {distance, duration, success}
```

---

## Additional Modules (Specialized)

### MementoRecordTracking (v1.1.0)
File: `core/MementoRecordTracking.js` (284 lines)
- Record lifecycle tracking (creation, modification, deletion)
- Access via `utils.recordTracking`

### MementoIDConflictResolver (v1.1.0)
File: `core/MementoIDConflictResolver.js` (277 lines)
- ID conflict resolution for multi-user team environments
- Access via `utils.idConflictResolver`

### MementoAutoNumber (v1.1.0) - DEPRECATED
File: `core/MementoAutoNumber.js` (363 lines)
- Use `MementoBusiness.generateNextNumber()` instead

### MementoVAT (v1.1.0) - DEPRECATED
File: `core/MementoVAT.js` (642 lines)
- Use `MementoCalculations.calculateVAT()` instead

### MementoSync (v1.1.0)
File: `core/MementoSync.js` (697 lines)
- PostgreSQL synchronization (specialized, import on demand)

### MementoSign (v1.0.0)
File: `core/MementoSign.js` (530 lines)
- Digital signature / confirmation workflows

### MementoLogCapture (v1.0.0)
File: `core/MementoLogCapture.js` (380 lines)
- Advanced log capture and aggregation

---

## Script Template Pattern

Every script should follow this structure (from Template-Script.js v9.0.0):

```javascript
// Header: Library, Name, Type, Version, Dependencies

// 1. MODULE INITIALIZATION
var utils = MementoUtils;
var currentEntry = entry();
var CONFIG = utils.createScriptConfig("ScriptName", "1.0.0");

// 2. DEPENDENCY VALIDATION
function initializeScript() {
    var depCheck = utils.checkAllDependencies();
    if (!depCheck.success) {
        dialog("Missing Dependencies", depCheck.missing.join("\n"), "OK");
        return { success: false };
    }
    return { success: true };
}

// 3. INPUT VALIDATION
function validateInputs() {
    var config = MementoConfig.getConfig();
    var errors = [];
    var date = utils.safeGet(currentEntry, config.fields.attendance.date, null);
    if (!date) errors.push("Date is required");
    return { valid: errors.length === 0, errors: errors };
}

// 4. MAIN LOGIC
function processRecord() {
    var config = MementoConfig.getConfig();
    // ... business logic using utils.time, utils.calculations, etc.
    return { success: true, data: {} };
}

// 5. EXECUTION
try {
    var init = initializeScript();
    if (!init.success) cancel();

    var validation = validateInputs();
    if (!validation.valid) {
        dialog("Validation Error", validation.errors.join("\n"), "OK");
        cancel();
    }

    var result = processRecord();
    if (result.success) {
        utils.addInfo(currentEntry, "Done", result.data, CONFIG);
    }
} catch (e) {
    utils.addError(currentEntry, "Script failed: " + e.message, "main", e);
}
```

---

## Naming Convention Quick Reference

### Library Prefixes
```
Doch   = Attendance (Dochádzka)
Knij   = Vehicle logbook (Kniha jázd)
Mat    = Materials (Materiál)
Pokl   = Cash register (Pokladňa)
Zam    = Employee (Zamestnanec)
Zak    = Orders (Zákazky)
Zazp   = Work records (Záznam prác)
CenPon = Price quotes (Cenové ponuky)
DenRep = Daily report (Denný report)
VykPr  = Work report (Výkaz prác)
```

### Script Types
```
Calc       = Calculation (triggers on save)
Trigger    = Database event handler (BeforeDelete, AfterSave)
Action     = Manual operation (button/menu)
BulkAction = Batch operation on multiple records
Button     = UI button handler
Notif      = Notification management
```

### Examples
```
Doch.Calc.Main.js          - Main attendance calculation
Pokl.Action.PayObligations.js - Manual payment action
Zak.Trigger.AutoNumber.js   - Auto-numbering on new order
Doch.Notif.Individual.js    - Individual attendance notification
Mat.BulkAction.UpdatePrices.js - Batch price update
```

---

## Summary Statistics

| Category | Count |
|----------|-------|
| Core modules | 21 |
| Library-specific modules | 28 |
| Wrapper scripts | 98 |
| Library directories | 27 |
| Public API functions | 153+ |
| Config field mappings | 1000+ |
| Icons defined | 100+ |
| Total codebase | ~663KB |
